allow: Bash(git add .editorconfig .gitignore LICENSE README.md shard.yml spec/ src/ CLAUDE.md)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Implement TimeControl spec helper for virtual time control

Intercepts Crystal's event loop at the `Crystal::EventLoop::Polling#sleep`
level and patches `Fiber#timeout`/`cancel_timeout` to redirect sleeping
fibers into a virtual timer queue instead of the real event loop.

A dedicated `Fiber::ExecutionContext::Isolated` thread runs the timer loop,
processing advance commands and waking sleeping fibers in virtual-time order
by calling `fiber.enqueue` back into their original execution context. Timers
are processed one at a time with a 1ms settle wait between each to allow
chained and nested sleeps to register before the next timer fires.

API: `TimeControl.control { |remote| remote.advance\(1.second\) }`

Requires `-Dexecution_context` compile flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
